quotes.text: It is done! The armies of Ulduar are bound by oath to join us now that we're in possession of the Gjallerhorn!
Our enemies are closer than we think.
The Legion cannot hide from us.
Speak, mortal.
If you only understood the implications of your actions!
The guard sees all! Knows all!
I'm starting to question Odyn's choice.
Do you ever give up?!
Suit yourself!
I am vigilant.
I serve Skyhold.
The battle is eternal.
I am not nervous. Only... excited. All my life has led to this one glorious moment.
I will purge them from these sacred halls myself!
I will not fail you, Eyir!
Begone from these hallowed halls!
You will pollute these halls no more!
None can stand against Eyir's chosen!
You die as you lived: without honor.
It is done, Eyir! The sanctity of this place is preserved.
I am sorry, Eyir... I have failed you...
Eyir... you were wrong to put your faith in me...
No! I, too, have proved my worth, Odyn. I am God-King Skovald!
Give up the aegis or die!
The aegis goes to its rightful owner!
Trial by fire!
No one stands in my way!
All my plans... brought to ruin...
There is one final trial that awaits: me. Should you triumph, I will carve your names in these sacred halls myself and grant you a reward worthy of your valor.
Are you ready to face me?
It has been ages since I faced a worthy opponent. Let the battle begin!
My power is beyond anything you have yet faced!
Be warned, champions: I will hold NOTHING back!
Yield now... or I will call upon my true power!
Let us see if your wits are as sharp as your weapons.
An agile mind is as deadly as the sharpest blade!
Every opponent has a weakness. I will find yours!
Mighty Valarjar! Heed my summons!
To me, Valarjar! Prove your worth!
Fight for me, Valarjar! Fight for GLORY!
Do not be ashamed. You've fought with courage and honor.
There is no shame in defeat, so long as one fights with valor.
A noble effort.
Well fought.
I was only getting started.
Did you really hope to best me?
I feel... invigorated. Care to try again champions?
Enough! I... I yield! You are truly remarkable creatures. As promised, you will have your just reward.
